title: gliricidia robusta
intro: Gliricidia robusta, also known as 'Kapur tree', is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. This plant has been widely studied for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Gliricidia robusta include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, while also acting as a natural anti-histamine. Gliricidia robusta is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
